title: Audiophile
description: More chill music discs that will enhance your Minecraft experience!
body: # What is Audiophile? Audiophile is another UnperishedFoods project adding more great music discs to Minecraft and allowing for a better in-game experience. If you enjoy Audiophile, I suggest also installing the [Music Redefined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-redefined) resource pack! # Copyright info All music in this mod is made by me. If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to view the attached license or email me at unperishedfoods@gmail.com.
